_doc: Pass-through rates and lag estimates for solar material price propagation. passThrough = fraction of raw material price change that reaches module cost. lagDaysMin/Max = typical time for price changes to propagate through supply chain.

silver.note: High pass-through: paste is a direct input, short supply chain

aluminum.note: Frame extrusion contracts often have quarterly price adjustments

glass.note: Solar glass has concentrated suppliers, longer-term contracts

silicon.note: Polysilicon is the core feedstock but contract prices lag spot

steel.note: Racking/mounting — often ordered in bulk with price locks

tin.note: Solder — small absolute cost but responsive to spot
